title: black
text:
SYSTEM / CODING TASK

You are unifying modal styling in SnipBoard using the existing design tokens (CSS variables).

HARD RULES (DO NOT VIOLATE)

Modify only styles.css

Do NOT modify HTML

Do NOT modify JavaScript

Do NOT change modal behavior, logic, or structure

Do NOT add or remove UI elements

Do NOT introduce animations or transitions

This task is visual consistency only.

GOAL

Ensure all modals (including color picker and icon picker):

share the same typography

share the same spacing rhythm

share the same corner radius

share the same button styling

Modals should feel like first-class panels, not special-case popups.

MODALS IN SCOPE

This includes (but is not limited to):

Color picker modal

Icon picker modal

Any generic .modal or .dialog containers

REQUIRED STYLING RULES

Apply the following using existing design tokens:

1. Modal Container

Use --radius-xl for modal corners

Apply consistent internal padding using --space-md

Use the same font family and base font s
